title: VERITAS Continuation Runtime — Phase-1 Schema
description: Defines the continuation types used by the Continuation Runtime (shadow-only phase-1).

ContinuationStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a continuation claim.

SupportStatus.description: Whether the evidence basis for a claim still holds.

RefusalBoundary.description: Phase-1 refusal boundary. 'none' means no refusal; 'pre_tool_execution' means shadow-refusal before tool execution.

ContinuationClaim.description: A claim that a prior decision's support still holds.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for this continuation claim.

decision_request_id.description: The request_id of the original decision this claim references.

support_basis.description: Evidence keys or references that support this claim.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim was created.

SupportSnapshot.description: A point-in-time snapshot of the evidence basis for a claim.

claim_id.description: The claim this snapshot belongs to.

support_basis.description: Evidence keys or references valid at snapshot time.

ContinuationAssessment.description: The Continuation Runtime's evaluation of a claim. Included in /v1/decide response as the optional 'continuation' field.

support_basis.description: Current evidence basis supporting the claim.

allowed_action_classes.description: Action classes permitted under this continuation assessment.

revocation_reason_code.description: Machine-readable reason code if the claim was revoked, or null.

shadow_refusal.description: Whether the runtime would refuse this action in enforcement mode. Shadow-only in phase-1.
